title: Personalization in My Work
excerpt:

posts.author: ICOM_izanellato (Isabella Zanellato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
we’re interested if it would be possible to add a new feature in the Menu My Work. Because we have many workspaces, we have the need to be able to see the elements in My Work divided by workspace and then by data/status.
Could this feature be added?
Thanks

posts.author: andrew.marshall (Andrew Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml: THANK YOU! This is critical for us as well. We use priorities (a status field) and Estimated Time (a number field, to track how long projects should take so we can optimize workload), and I can’t see these in My Work, which makes “My Work” pretty useless for our team.
